title: Argon
description: Argon is a mod who add multiple utility feature.
body: # **Argon** ### __**What is this ?**__ Argon is a mod who add some utility feature who i list below : - SafeDropMod to prevent from false drop. [![https://medal.tv/](https://i.imgur.com/tLZ2psa.png)](https://medal.tv/fr/games/minecraft/clips/YKnsUtMtet_Zb/rDfbpuC9ZM9E?invite=cr-MSxPRFYsMTQxMzU5MDgwLA) - Tools Disabler who disable low durability item to prevent from accidental item broke. ### __**How to test it ?**__ You can use the command below to give u a low durability pickaxe, mining 4 or 5 block with the pickaxe and check at level 15 of durability, u can't broke more. **```/give @s minecraft:netherite_pickaxe{Damage:2013}```** And you can use the command below to test the drop protection. **```/give @s netherite_pickaxe{Enchantments:[{id:efficiency,lvl:250}]} 1```** Futur update add the possibility to protect the drop without adapt keybind with the custom protection keybind. (U can test feature in singleplayer with the command above). ## Download ## Other
